title.en: JET-PROPULSION PLANTS (features of jet-propulsion plants common to gas-turbine plants, air intakes or fuel supply control of air-breathing jet-propulsion plants F02C7/00, F02C9/00)
Plants characterised by the form or arrangement of the jet pipe or nozzle; Jet pipes or nozzles peculiar thereto (rocket nozzles F02K9/97)
{with means to modify the direction of thrust vector (F02K1/54 takes precedence; thrust vectoring of rockets F02K9/80)}
Mounting of an exhaust cone in the jet pipe
Varying effective area of jet pipe or nozzle (by using fluid jets to influence the jet flow F02K1/30)
using fluid jets to influence the jet flow
having an ejector
Introducing air inside the jet (F02K1/28 takes precedence)
Nozzles having means for dividing the jet into a plurality of partial jets or having an elongated cross-section outlet
Nozzles having means, e.g. a shield, reducing sound radiation in a specified direction (F02K1/40 takes precedence)
Nozzles having means for adding air to the jet or for augmenting the mixing region between the jet and the ambient air, e.g. for silencing (F02K1/28, F02K1/36, F02K1/38 take precedence)
Nozzles specially constructed for positioning adjacent to another nozzle or to a fixed member, e.g. fairing
Nozzles having means for reversing jet thrust (reversing jet thrust using fluid jets F02K1/32)
Other construction of jet pipes
Plants including a gas turbine driving a compressor or a ducted fan
in which part of the working fluid by-passes the turbine and combustion chamber
with supplementary heating of the working fluid; Control thereof (control of fuel supply therefor F02C9/26)
characterised by having more than one gas turbine
Plants including an engine, other than a gas turbine, driving a compressor or a ducted fan
the engine being of the reciprocating-piston type
Plants in which the working fluid is used in a jet only, i.e. the plants not having a turbine or other engine driving a compressor or a ducted fan; Control thereof (rocket-engine plants F02K9/00)
{the engine comprising a rotor rotating under the actions of jets issuing from this rotor}
the jet being intermittent, i.e. pulse-jet
the jet being continuous
characterised by having ram-action compression, i.e. aero-thermo-dynamic-ducts or ram-jet engines
Rocket-engine plants, i.e. plants carrying both fuel and oxidant therefor; Control thereof
using solid propellants (F02K9/72 takes precedence; using semi-solid or pulverulent propellants F02K9/70)
using liquid or gaseous propellants (F02K9/72 takes precedence)
using semi- solid or pulverulent propellants
using liquid and solid propellants, i.e. hybrid rocket-engine plants
combined with another jet-propulsion plant

characterised by thrust or thrust vector control (burning control of solid propellants F02K9/26; feeding control of liquid or gaseous propellants F02K9/56; re-ignitable, restartable or intermittently operated rocket-engine plants F02K9/94)
Re-ignitable or restartable rocket- engine plants; Intermittently operated rocket-engine plants
characterised by starting or ignition means or arrangements (safety devices F02K9/38)
characterised by specially adapted arrangements for testing or measuring
Rocket nozzles (thrust or thrust vector control F02K9/80)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
